extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH Mark won the processional Rome finale sprint in his seventh Giro appearance, finishing his first win in four years for Astana.
tactical_patterns: THOMAS Geraint pulling in final leadout suggests Sky/INEOS climbers defaulting to sprint domestique work even post-GC effort.
MILAN Jonathan successfully disrupted GANNA intermediate sprint hunting despite holding points jersey, revealing defensive sprint classification tactics.

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: First win in four years suggests Astana setup unlocked something previous teams couldn't after decline
rider_signals.GAVILIA Milan: negative: Going from distance in Rome sprint indicates lack of confidence in positioning or leadout strength
